name: Bacon-Wrapped Turkey Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Set oven control to broil and/or 550 degrees.
2. Cook the bacon until limp; cool.
3. Mix the turkey, bread crumbs, Worcestershire sauce, and garlic salt in a bowl. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
4. Shape the mixture into six patties that are approximately 6 1/2 inches thick.
5. Crisscross two slices of bacon on each patty, tucking the ends under. Secure each patty with wooden picks.
6. Broil the patties with the tops about 4 inches from the heat until the turkey springs back when touched and is no longer pink, approximately 4 minutes on each side.
